title: NeoGuide: Welcome to LDI
text: The screen lights up in front of you with a cold blue glow.
A female silhouette materializes in the center. She wears a holographic trench coat — the Virtual Assistant NeoGuide.
[NEOGUIDE] "Welcome to the LDI. Your identity here doesn't exist yet. Let's build one."
[NEOGUIDE] "First of all... how do you prefer to move within the network?"

choices.label: Explosion and speed — break in, break everything
Silence and precision — go unnoticed
Resistance and presence — nobody moves you

title: NeoGuide: Digital Essence
text: NeoGuide nods, processing your choice.
[NEOGUIDE] "Interesting. Your digital signature is forming..."
She raises her hand and a sphere of elemental energy appears.
[NEOGUIDE] "This is your origin element. I didn't choose it — the system read your digital residue and extracted this."
The sphere pulses with liquid energy.

choices.label: Accept the element the system chose
Refuse — "Nah man, I'm not about that, no thanks"

title: NeoGuide: Combat Kit
text: The sphere dissipates and NeoGuide crosses her arms.
[NEOGUIDE] "OK, now the fun part. What combat style do you want to carry?"
Three holograms appear beside her: an Ice Axe, a Lightning Rapier, and a Fire Chain.
[NEOGUIDE] "Choose your weapon. The LDI is about surviving and moving forward — you don't have a choice."

choices.label: Ice Axe — brutality and destruction
Lightning Rapier — speed and precision
Fire Chain — versatility and defense

title: NeoGuide: Purpose
text: NeoGuide leans forward, her holographic gaze fixed on you.
[NEOGUIDE] "Last question. And the most important one."
[NEOGUIDE] "What do you want to achieve inside the LDI?"
The surroundings darken, and three paths light up before you.

choices.label: Power — reach the top of the ranking
Knowledge — unravel the system's secrets
Connection — build alliances and history

title: DISCONNECTION
text: Suddenly, NeoGuide freezes.
Her holographic eyes go dark and light up red.
[NEOGUIDE] "S—Something... S—Something... wrong... wrong..."
The ground beneath you dissolves into pixels. The digital sky tears apart.
An invisible shockwave throws you back. NeoGuide disappears.
You fall. And fall. And fall.
Until the impact never comes.
You open your eyes.
You're in a deserted digital square. The sky has a sickly violet hue. Signs flicker with corrupted messages.
Welcome to the LDI. Day 1.

choices.label: Explore the square

title: First Day — Central Square
text: The LDI Central Square looks like an abandoned cyberpunk shopping mall.
Neon signs flicker in empty shops. A few avatars pass by quickly, avoiding eye contact.
In the center of the square, a public terminal still works.
What do you do?

choices.label: Examine the public terminal
Follow one of the avatars that passed quickly
Look for an exit from the square
Test your gear in an alley
Shout for help
Sit and observe — learn before acting
I've explored enough — rest and wait for Day 2

title: Public Terminal
text: The terminal flickers with a message:
[SYSTEM] "WELCOME, UNREGISTERED PLAYER."
[SYSTEM] "YOU HAVE 0 CREDITS."
[SYSTEM] "MISSION AVAILABLE: [Initial Contact] — Accept?"
The screen trembles. For a moment, a second message overlaps:
[SYSTEM] "DON'T TRUST THE SYSTEM."
And it vanishes.

choices.label: Accept the mission [Initial Contact]
Ignore and keep exploring

title: Following the Avatar
text: You follow the avatar through narrow corridors. He enters a dead-end alley.
When he turns, you see his face: it's a low-ranked robot, red eyes glowing.
"You're the rookie?" — the voice is metallic, distorted.
"Get out of here. Today is collection day. The StormBytes are coming."
He vanishes in a cloud of data.

choices.label: Go back to the square and process the information

title: Looking for an Exit
text: You find a locked gate with an access panel beside it.
The panel requires a 4-digit code.
A sign next to it says: "COMMERCIAL ZONE → EAST"
You can try to hack it or give up.

choices.label: Try to hack the panel (H test)
Go back — don't risk it now

title: Gear Test
text: In the alley, you draw your weapon and test a few swings.
The system displays your status in real-time: damage, range, speed.
You feel the digital weight of the weapon in your hand. It's real in here.
Suddenly, an alert: a ranked fighter (rank 850,000) is approaching.
[STORMBYTE] "Hey, rookie! Restricted zone for unregistered!"

choices.label: Fight — first battle
Flee — run back to the square

title: Gear Test
text: You brandish your weapon and assume a combat stance.
The ranked fighter grins. "This is gonna hurt you, not me."

choices.label: Fight!

title: First Victory
text: StormByte falls. The system registers the victory with a dry beep.
You stand still, looking at where he was. The pain that remains is real. So is the satisfaction.
On the floating display in front of you: +80 credits. Rank updated.
You returned to the square with something new in your posture.

choices.label: Keep exploring the square

title: Asking for Help
text: You shout. A few avatars stop and look.
A tall figure, hooded with digital sunglasses, approaches.
[KAEDA] "Rookie?" — the voice is feminine, dry.
[KAEDA] "First rule: don't call attention. Second: follow me."
She turns without waiting for an answer.

choices.label: Follow the hooded figure
Be suspicious and stay in the square

title: Observing
text: You sit on a digital bench and observe.
Twenty minutes pass. You notice patterns:
- The avatars follow specific routes, like NPCs.
- One of them — a robot with a gold insignia — seems different. He looks directly at you.
- A private message arrives on your display:
"I need you. Square → Terminal → Mission [Initial Contact]."
The message has no sender.

choices.label: Go to the terminal and accept the mission
Ignore the message and explore on your own

title: Data Haunting
text: A strange feeling has been following you since you arrived.
Something about the LDI seems... familiar. Wrong. Like you've been here before.
The signs flicker in patterns your brain tries to decode.
You squint and see numbers for a moment. Pure code. The skeleton of the world.
And then it passes.

choices.label: Ignore the feeling — focus on the present
Make a mental note — this could be important

title: Day 2 — Routine
text: The second day in the LDI dawns without sun — the violet sky simply lightens a shade.
You woke up in a safety cube you rented with 0 credits. The system gave you a deadline.
Notifications: - [SYSTEM] Welcome to Day 2. You have 3 days to perform your first ranked kill. - [SYSTEM] Available credits: 0. - [PRIVATE MESSAGE] — Not deleted since yesterday.
What do you do today?

choices.label: Go hunting — you need credits
Investigate the private message
Explore the cube's surroundings

title: Hunting for Credits
text: You walk through the LDI corridors until you find the Training Arena.
Inside, some avatars train on simulators.
One of them stares at you — it's the low-ranked robot from yesterday.
[STORMBYTE] "Want easy credits? Fight me."

choices.label: Accept the duel
Refuse — not the right time

title: Investigating the Message
text: You open the private message. The text is simple:
"You didn't fall here by accident. I know what you are. Central Square, terminal. Noon."
There's no identification. The sender is listed as: [CORRUPTED DATA].

choices.label: Go to the terminal at noon
Ignore — official missions first

title: Cube Surroundings
text: Outside the cube, you find a digital black market.
Vendors sell everything from modified weapons to information.
A vendor calls you: "Psst. Rookie. Want a free tip?"
"Stay away from the East Zone today. The StormBytes are sweeping."
He vanishes before you can ask more.

choices.label: Go to the East Zone anyway
Go back — useful info, but better not risk it

title: Day 3 — The Deadline Approaches
text: Third day. The system displays a red warning in the corner of your vision:
[SYSTEM] "1 DAY LEFT FOR RANKED KILL. PENALTY: ACCESS SUSPENSION."
You need to act. What do you do?

choices.label: Go to the Arena — face whoever shows up
Look for a contact — someone who can help
Accept the official terminal mission

title: Official Mission
text: The terminal displays the mission:
"[OFFICIAL MISSION] — Ranked Kill: Eliminate a ranked opponent at the East Arena.
Reward: 500 credits + Access to the Central Market.
Failure penalty: 7-day suspension."
You confirm. The mission is active.
The East Arena is 15 minutes away. Do you go?

choices.label: Go to the East Arena
Prepare first — buy equipment
